# Portfolio Page ‚Äî Prototype Spec

**Generated from:** `artifacts/hospitality-business-portal/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx` + `src/components/portfolio/PortfolioPropertyCard.tsx`
**Target Figma file:** https://www.figma.com/design/2ZNLoX39bG4jOK41uSt32v (blank, created via MCP)

**Date:** 2026-05-19

> **Note:** Replit's Figma MCP does not expose `use_figma` (Plugin API executor).

> This document is the Prototype Spec Document fallback (skill ¬ß "Inspect-only output").

---

## Overview

The Portfolio page is the primary user-facing landing area after login. It shows every managed property as a card in a 3-column grid, sorted by acquisition date. Users can add new properties, toggle properties active/inactive (which excludes them from all financial calculations), delete properties, and ‚Äî when unassigned properties exist ‚Äî assign them to a named portfolio group.

T2-2 proposes adding a portfolio filter dropdown to the page header so users can filter the grid to a specific portfolio, show only unassigned properties, or show everything.

**Open questions for reviewers:**
- Should the T2-2 filter be a dropdown (Select) or a segmented control / tab row?
- When "Unassigned" is selected, should the existing Unassigned section at the bottom collapse, or should the whole grid switch to show only unassigned cards?
- Does the "Excluded from portfolio" overlay on inactive cards still show correctly when filtering?

---

## Component Inventory

| Code component | Key props / variants | DS match | Build approach |
|---|---|---|---|
| `<PageHeader>` | `variant="dark"`, title, subtitle, actions slot | None found | Primitives ‚Äî dark bar, title text, subtitle text, right-aligned actions slot |
| `<Button variant="outline">` | `+ Add Property` | shadcn Button | Import DS Button, `variant=outline` |
| `<AddPropertyDialog>` | multi-step dialog, controlled open | None (custom) | Primitives ‚Äî dialog overlay + multi-field form |
| `<AnimatedGrid>` | `className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3"` | None | Auto-layout frame, 3 cols, 24px gap |
| `<PortfolioPropertyCard>` | `property`, `propertyNumber`, `onDelete`, `onToggleActive` | None | Primitives ‚Äî card with shadow, see breakdown below |
| `<HeroImage>` | `aspectRatio="16/10"`, gradient overlay | None | Image placeholder frame with gradient overlay |
| Property number badge | position: bottom-left of hero | None | Small rounded circle, JetBrains Mono number |
| Property type badge | position: top-left of hero (`Full Equity` / `Financed`) | None | Pill badge, color by type |
| Status badge | position: top-right of hero | None | Pill badge, color by status (see below) |
| "Excluded from portfolio" overlay | visible when `isActive=false` | None | Semi-transparent overlay + pill label |
| "Enhanced" badge | bottom-right of hero, when AI-enhanced photo | None | Small pill, bg-primary/70 |
| `<PropertyTypeBadge>` | `type`, `starRating` | None | Inline badge next to property name |
| `<ValidationStatusBadge>` | `property` | None | Analyst validation indicator |
| Property name | `font-display text-xl` | None | Display font text node |
| Location line | `<IconMapPin>` + text | None | Icon + text row |
| Map / 3D links | `<IconMap>` `<IconGlobe>`, shown when coordinates present | None | Icon buttons inline with location |
| Acquisition date line | `<IconCalendar>` + text | None | Icon + text row |
| Description | `line-clamp-3`, 60-word truncation | None | Multi-line text node |
| Link chips | pill chips for `propertyUrls` (max 3 visible) | None | Pill row, border-primary/20 bg-primary/5 |
| Metrics grid | Acquisition price + Capacity, `bg-primary/5 rounded-lg` | None | 2-col grid of stat tiles |
| Active/Inactive toggle | `<Switch>` + label | shadcn Switch | Import DS Switch, `checked` variant |
| Card footer | trash icon + Photos icon + Assumptions button + Details button | shadcn Button (outline, ghost) | Buttons row ‚Äî import DS |
| `<ContextMenu>` | right-click on card | shadcn ContextMenu | Import DS ContextMenu |
| Unassigned section | `border-t pt-6`, header + count + `<Select>` + row list | None (custom) | Primitives section |
| `<Select>` (portfolio picker) | `w-[200px]`, `placeholder="Select portfolio‚Ä¶"` | shadcn Select | Import DS Select |
| Unassigned property row | `rounded-lg border bg-card px-4 py-3` | None | Primitive row |
| Assign button | `variant="outline" size="sm"` | shadcn Button | Import DS Button |
| T2-2 filter Select | `placeholder="All Properties"` (proposed) | shadcn Select | Import DS Select |
| `<PageLoadingState>` | ‚Äî | None | Spinner + text placeholder |
| `<PageErrorState>` | `message` | None | Error card primitive |

**Status badge colors:**
| Status | Color token | Approximate hex |
|---|---|---|
| Operating | `bg-primary` | olive green |
| Improvements | `bg-accent-pop` | amber |
| Acquired / Planned | `bg-chart-1` | blue |
| In Negotiation | `bg-chart-3` | teal |
| Pipeline | `bg-muted0` | gray |

---

## Flows

### Flow 1: Page Load

**Goal:** User navigates to `/portfolio`
**Entry point:** Sidebar nav item "Portfolio"

#### State 1.1 ‚Äî Loading

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900 (desktop)
- **Layout:** Full-width layout with sidebar (240px) + content area (1200px)
- **Content:** `<PageLoadingState>` ‚Äî spinner centered in content area, no grid
- **Annotations:**
  - **State Change:** Loading state ‚Äî `useProperties()` query in-flight. API: `GET /api/properties`

#### State 1.2 ‚Äî Error

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900
- **Layout:** Same sidebar + content, `<PageErrorState>` card centered
- **Content:** "Failed to load portfolio data" message
- **Annotations:**
  - **Error Handling:** Shown when `isError=true`. No retry button ‚Äî user must refresh. API failure on `GET /api/properties`.

#### State 1.3 ‚Äî Default (Properties loaded, none unassigned)

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900
- **Layout:**
  - Left: Sidebar 240px ‚Äî logo, nav items (Portfolio active), Admin section
  - Top: PageHeader 80px ‚Äî dark bg, "Property Portfolio" / "Managed assets & developments", "Add Property" button right-aligned
  - Content: 3-column grid (gap 24px), cards sorted ascending by `acquisitionDate`
- **Interactions:**

  | Element | Trigger | Result |
  |---|---|---|
  | Add Property button | Click | Opens `AddPropertyDialog` ‚Üí Flow 2 |
  | PortfolioPropertyCard | Click "Details" | Navigate to `/property/:id` |
  | PortfolioPropertyCard | Click "Assumptions" | Navigate to `/property/:id/edit` |
  | PortfolioPropertyCard | Click camera icon | Navigate to `/property/:id/photos` |
  | Active toggle | Toggle off | `PUT /api/properties/:id` `{isActive:false}` ‚Äî card dims to 60% opacity + saturate-50, overlay appears |
  | Trash icon | Click | Opens `<AlertDialog>` confirm ‚Üí Flow 3 |
  | Card | Right-click | Shows `<ContextMenu>` with same nav options |

- **Annotations:**
  - **Interaction (frame):** Default state ‚Äî grid sorted by acquisition date (ascending). Primary CTA: Add Property.
  - **Interaction (Add Property button):** Tap ‚Üí opens multi-step AddPropertyDialog. On success: `POST /api/properties`, invalidates all financial queries, toast "Property Added".
  - **DS Drift:** PageHeader, AnimatedGrid, PortfolioPropertyCard ‚Äî no DS equivalents. All built from primitives.

#### State 1.4 ‚Äî Default with T2-2 Filter (Proposed)

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900
- **Layout:** Same as 1.3, but PageHeader actions slot has two controls: `[All Properties ‚ñæ]` `[+ Add Property]`
- **Filter behavior:**
  - `all` ‚Üí full grid (default, shown in 1.3)
  - `{ id: N }` ‚Üí grid filtered to `property.portfolioId === N`
  - `unassigned` ‚Üí grid filtered to `property.portfolioId == null`
- **Annotations:**
  - **Interaction (filter):** State lives in `assignmentTargetPortfolioId` discriminated union. Changing filter re-memos `filteredProperties` ‚Äî no API call, client-side filter only.

#### State 1.5 ‚Äî Unassigned Properties Section Visible

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó1100 (scrollable ‚Äî content taller than viewport)
- **Layout:** Same as 1.3, plus below the grid:
  - Border-top divider (pt-6 / 24px)
  - Header row: "Unassigned Properties" h2 + count subtitle | "Select portfolio‚Ä¶" Select (200px) right-aligned
  - List of property rows: name + location | "Assign to portfolio" button (disabled until portfolio selected)
- **Interactions:**

  | Element | Trigger | Result |
  |---|---|---|
  | Select portfolio dropdown | Select value | Enables all Assign buttons |
  | "Assign to portfolio" | Click (portfolio selected) | `PUT /api/properties/:id/portfolio` `{portfolioId}` ‚Üí success toast + grid invalidates |
  | "Assign to portfolio" | Click (no portfolio selected) | Button disabled ‚Äî no action |

- **Annotations:**
  - **Interaction (section):** Appears only when `unassignedProperties.length > 0`. Section state: `selectedPortfolioId` (null or number). One portfolio selected at a time; the same target portfolio applies to all Assign buttons.
  - **Interaction (Assign button):** `disabled={selectedPortfolioId == null || assignMutation.isPending}`. Pending state shows Loader2 spinner inline.
  - **Edge Case:** If assign fails, error toast shown. `portfolioId` must be non-null ‚Äî button guard prevents null assignment.

---

### Flow 2: Add Property

**Goal:** User creates a new property record
**Entry point:** "Add Property" button in PageHeader

#### State 2.1 ‚Äî Dialog open, empty form

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900 (dialog overlay)
- **Layout:** Full backdrop + centered dialog panel
- **Key fields:** Name, Location, Photo upload, Acquisition date (auto-fills ops start +6 months), Operations start date, Room count, ADR, model type
- **Interactions:**
  - Set acquisition date ‚Üí if ops start is empty, auto-fills to +6 months (`addMonths`)
  - Cancel ‚Üí dialog closes, form resets
  - Submit with missing name/location/photo ‚Üí error toast "Missing Information"
  - Submit with missing/invalid dates ‚Üí error toast
  - Submit valid ‚Üí `POST /api/properties` ‚Üí success toast, dialog closes

#### State 2.2 ‚Äî Validation error toast

- **Frame size:** Same dialog, toast visible bottom-right
- **Annotation ‚Äî Error Handling:** Three separate validation gates: (1) name+location+photo required, (2) both dates required, (3) ops start ‚â• acquisition date.

---

### Flow 3: Delete Property

**Goal:** User removes a property permanently
**Entry point:** Trash icon on any card, or "Delete Property" context menu item

#### State 3.1 ‚Äî Confirm dialog

- **Frame size:** 1440√ó900 (AlertDialog overlay)
- **Layout:** Centered dialog ‚Äî title "Delete Property?", description with property name, Cancel + Delete buttons
- **Interactions:**
  - Cancel ‚Üí dialog closes, no action
  - Delete ‚Üí `DELETE /api/properties/:id` ‚Üí success toast "Property Deleted", all financial queries invalidated

- **Annotations:**
  - **Interaction:** Destructive ‚Äî permanently removes property from the portfolio. Triggers full financial query invalidation (`invalidateQueries`). No undo.
  - **Error Handling:** On API failure ‚Üí error toast "Failed to delete [name]".

---

## Figma Build Guide

*For whoever builds this in Figma using a Full-tier client (Claude Code / Cursor):*

**Page name:** `Portfolio ‚Äî Prototype Flows`
**Frame layout:** Left-to-right within each flow, branches stacked vertically, ~200px gaps between frames, ~400px between flows
**Frame sizes:** 1440√ó900 (most states), 1440√ó1100 (unassigned section ‚Äî scrollable)

**Components to import from DS (shadcn):**
- `Button` ‚Äî variants: outline, ghost, default, destructive
- `Switch` ‚Äî checked / unchecked
- `Select` + `SelectTrigger` + `SelectContent` + `SelectItem`
- `AlertDialog` ‚Äî full set
- `ContextMenu` ‚Äî full set

**Components to build from primitives (no DS match):**
- `PageHeader` ‚Äî dark frame, title (font-display/Bold/22px), subtitle (Regular/13px), right-aligned actions slot
- `PortfolioPropertyCard` ‚Äî rounded-lg, border, shadow; hero image frame (16:10); badges top-left/top-right; number circle bottom-left; name + location + date rows; 2-col metrics grid; switch row; footer button row
- `AnimatedGrid` ‚Äî 3-col auto-layout, 24px gap
- `Unassigned section` ‚Äî border-top, heading, subtitle, Select, row list
- `PageLoadingState` ‚Äî centered spinner
- `PageErrorState` ‚Äî centered error card

**DS gaps to flag for design team:**
- `PageHeader` (dark variant) ‚Äî no Figma component
- `PortfolioPropertyCard` ‚Äî high complexity card with 7 distinct zones; strong candidate for DS addition
- `HeroImage` ‚Äî no DS image frame component with gradient overlay
- `PropertyTypeBadge` / `ValidationStatusBadge` ‚Äî inline indicator components not in DS
- `PageLoadingState` / `PageErrorState` ‚Äî full-screen feedback states not in DS
- `AnimatedGrid` ‚Äî layout wrapper with stagger animation, no DS equivalent

**Annotation priority order (2-4 per frame):**
1. Frame-level: state name + primary action
2. Add Property button: flow entry point
3. Active toggle: affects all financial calculations portfolio-wide
4. Unassigned Assign button: disabled-until-selection pattern worth calling out
